website.name: SafeSpace
website.description: SafeSpace is dedicated to helping women stay safe in digital spaces through education, resources, and community support.

safety_tips.title: Strong Passwords
safety_tips.description: Use passwords with mix of letters, numbers and symbols. Never share passwords. Use different passwords for different accounts.

safety_tips.title: Privacy Settings
safety_tips.description: Make your social media private. Control who can see your posts, photos and personal information. Review settings regularly.

safety_tips.title: Stranger Danger
safety_tips.description: Never trust strangers online. Be careful with personal information. Verify identities before sharing details.

safety_tips.title: Avoid Suspicious Links
safety_tips.description: Don't click unknown links. Check URLs before clicking. Be wary of shortened links from unknown sources.

safety_tips.title: Think Before Sharing
safety_tips.description: Once posted, it's permanent. Think about who can see your content. Avoid sharing location or schedules.

safety_tips.title: Device Safety
safety_tips.description: Keep software updated. Use antivirus protection. Never leave devices unattended. Lock your screen.

safety_tips.title: Camera & Mic Safety
safety_tips.description: Cover your webcam. Mute microphone when not in use. Be cautious in video calls with strangers.

safety_tips.title: Recognize Harassment
safety_tips.description: Unwanted messages, threats, or intimidation is harassment. Document everything. Block and report. Don't respond to trolls.

quiz_questions.question: Do you use the same password for multiple accounts?
How often do you review your privacy settings?
Do you share your real-time location online?
How do you handle messages from strangers?
Do you click on links from unknown sources?

seo.title: Women Safety Online - Your Trusted Digital Safety Guide
seo.description: Learn how to stay safe online with our comprehensive guides, emergency resources, and community support.
seo.keywords: women safety, online safety, digital security, cyberbullying prevention, online harassment
seo.author: SafeSpace Team
